name: Levi Ackerman
description:
art: @SHYKAYA // Old World AU 🐍 // Ereri // Naga Eren Yeager

Paradis is a vast, isolated land where three tribes live in harmony. Levi Ackerman, a skilled hunter and protector, follows a simple, steady life—until something from beyond challenges all he knows. (Idea loosely inspired by the tale of Adam&Eve...)
creator: graveman
